zones.name: North Austin
zones.notes: Mix of apartments and tech office parks. Parking generally available. Cedar Park extends this zone north.

zones.name: Central North
zones.notes: Dense residential. Street parking can be tight. Many older homes without driveways.

zones.name: Downtown / Core
zones.notes: Heavy traffic. Limited parking. Many high-rises require loading dock coordination. Best to arrive before 9 AM or after 1 PM.

zones.name: East Austin
zones.notes: Rapidly developing area. Mix of original residential and new construction. Some one-way streets.

zones.name: South Austin
zones.notes: Popular residential area. Many bungalows and craftsman homes. S Congress and S Lamar corridors have commercial density.

zones.name: West Austin / Westlake
zones.notes: Affluent residential. Larger lots. Many gated communities — confirm gate codes before dispatch. Hilly terrain slows routes.

known_problem_areas.issue: Construction on Congress Ave through May 2024. Avoid 10am-2pm.
known_problem_areas.alternate_route: Take Lavaca St or Guadalupe St instead

known_problem_areas.issue: Heavy congestion 7:30-9am and 4-6pm. Allow 30% extra time.
Gated community. Security checkpoint adds 10-15 min per entry.
No vehicle access on The Drag during event days. Check calendar.
known_problem_areas.alternate_route: Guadalupe from 38th St south or MLK from east
